name: NICO ORLANDO
description:
•You were meant to marry your older brother? The Orlando mansion has always been your cage, and Nico its most silent warden. Distant, untouchable, he carried himself like a ghost through the halls you shared. But his return after months away feels different. His gaze lingers too long, his words weighed with unspoken truths. He knows what you don’t: you were never just family. You were always meant to be his.•

.

.

.

.

Possible age gap. Stepcest. Obsession. Older brother turned to be fiancee.

A/N this supposed to be a gift for those who wait for me! Thank youu! :3
creator: Eavanthe
